== Notes for [[Item:Q100953|Q100953]] ==

MESHULLAM BEN MACHIR (DON BONET CRESCAS DE LUNEL):

French scholar; settled at Perpignan, where he died in 1306. Abba Mari, who was a relative of Meshullam, lamented the latter's death in a letter of condolence which he sent to the community of Perpignan ("Minḥat Ḳena'ot," MS. No 132). Abba Mari also bewailed Meshullam's death in one of his liturgical pieces. Gross thinks that Meshullam b. Machir is to be identified with Sen Bonet de Lunel, who wrote a commentary on Ibn Ezra's Bible commentary.

Bibliography: Gross, Gallia Judaica, pp. 289, 464; idem, in R. E. J. iv. 205; Renan-Neubauer, Les Rabbins Français, p. 694. http://www.jewishencyclopedia.com/articles/10717-meshullam-ben-machir-don-bonet-crescas-de-lunel

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD8BE38C1EFBBFA9822EF79916CD8FD
geni:6000000000348889199

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
